name: Cohesity
description: Monitor Cohesity DataProtect for backup job status, cluster infrastructure inventory, and alerting for enterprise backup and data management compliance

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Cohesity API key. Generate in Settings > Access Management > API Keys. If not using API key, provide username and password instead.

credentialFields.label: Username
credentialFields.helpText: Cohesity admin username (used if API Key is not provided)

credentialFields.label: Password
credentialFields.helpText: Cohesity admin password (used if API Key is not provided)

checks.name: Backup logs
checks.description: Monitors Cohesity protection job status and recent backup runs to ensure backups are completing successfully

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Inventories Cohesity cluster nodes, protection sources, and storage domains to verify infrastructure is properly configured

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Reviews active Cohesity alerts to identify critical issues, hardware failures, and security events requiring attention
